description: Taking traditional designs and giving it modern twist is what makes maxima watches irreplaceable timepieces. This classic analog wrist watch is no exception. Contemporary and trendy, it& rsquo s an affordable timepiece, with an exquisite design that highlights your individuality. Case diameter: 34 mm Case thickness: 12 mm Dial shape: Rectangle Warranty: 1 year Metallic case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfort Ssteele logo at the 12-hour mark Stainless steel bracelet with a butterfly clasp White dial with numbers in metal and has metallic lines Date aperture at the 3-hour mark Screw to reset time Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistant up to 30 metres - usable while washing hands or in mild rain
